title: 2007 The Mystery of the Bayon Face Towers
highlights: essay examines the cultural and religious shifts in the Bàyon temple complex during and after the reign of Jayavarma Parameśvara, focusing on the iconography of the face towers. It questions the interpretations of the faces as Buddhist or Shaiva and discusses evidence of religious tolerance and the alterations made post-Jayavarman VII.
